name: Ria Envia
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is an international remittance service enabling fast money transfers to 190+ countries through online, mobile app, and in-person channels with 600,000+ payout locations worldwide.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer has operated for over 35 years as a global money transfer provider specializing in international remittances. The company facilitates transfers to over 190 countries and territories, positioning itself as a trusted cross-border payment solution for individuals sending money to family and friends abroad.

Ria offers multiple transmission channels: online web-based transfers, a mobile app (iOS/Android), in-person cash payments at physical agent locations, WhatsApp integration, and cash pickup at 600,000+ worldwide locations. Recipients can receive funds via bank deposit, cash pickup, digital wallet, home delivery, or ATM withdrawal. The service supports over 100 currencies and advertises competitive exchange rates with transparent fee structures (example: $1.99 USD fee for Mexico transfers).

The company distinguishes itself through scale (600,000+ agent locations), speed (transfers quoted within seconds), multi-modal delivery options, and brand recognition as an official sponsor of the Mexican National Team. User ratings are strong across platforms (4.9/5 on iOS, 4.8/5 on Google Play, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot with 34.7k reviews), and they emphasize a 100% satisfaction guarantee and claims of over one billion safe transfers completed.

While Ria operates as a legitimate remittance provider with substantial market presence, consumers should note that international money transfer fees, exchange rate markups, and delivery times vary significantly by corridor and method. The current categorization as "check-cashing" is technically inaccurate—this is primarily a remittance/international money transfer service, though it does share some functional overlap with traditional money order and wire transfer services.
pros: 600,000+ global payout locations across 190+ countries enabling widespread cash pickup access
Multiple send methods including online, mobile app, in-person, WhatsApp, reducing friction for different user preferences
Strong independent ratings: 4.9/5 stars on iOS with 246.9k reviews and 4.5/5 on Trustpilot
Fast delivery quoted in seconds with same-day or next-day settlement options
100+ currency support with transparent exchange rates and upfront fee disclosure
Official partnership with Mexican National Team indicating brand scale and credibility
35+ year operational history demonstrating sustained market presence and regulatory compliance
cons: Transfer fees apply (example $1.99 USD minimum shown for Mexico), reducing net value received by recipient
Exchange rates include markup above interbank rates—actual rates customers receive are not competitively disclosed
No explicit mention of fraud protection, error resolution processes, or regulatory guarantees beyond "100% satisfaction guarantee"
Mobile app availability limited to specific countries; not all corridors accessible via all channels
Delivery times vary by corridor and method; cash pickup requires recipient proximity to agent location
best_for: Immigrant workers and expats regularly sending money to family in Latin America, Africa, Asia, or Europe
Individuals without bank accounts or banking relationships seeking accessible cash-based fund delivery
Users prioritizing convenience of multiple send/receive options over absolute lowest-cost transfers
Senders requiring same-day or next-day international settlement for time-sensitive transfers
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best suited for regular international remitters—primarily immigrant workers and expats sending funds to family abroad—who value convenience and broad payout access over absolute cost minimization. The primary caveat is that while Ria offers legitimacy and scale, consumers should compare transfer fees and exchange rate markups against competitors like Wise, OFX, or direct bank transfers before committing, as the markup on exchange rates may be substantial despite transparent upfront fee disclosure.
services: Online money transfer via website with real-time rate quotes
Mobile app-based international money transfers with tracking functionality
In-person cash payment at physical agent locations
WhatsApp-integrated money transfer to select countries
Bank deposit delivery to recipient accounts
Cash pickup at 600,000+ global agent locations
Home delivery of funds in select corridors
IBAN calculator for bank transfer verification
Real-time transfer tracking and status updates
